name: JACK HENRY & ASSOCIATES INC
summary: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. is a financial technology company founded in 1976 that provides technology solutions to approximately 7,400 financial institutions, including community and regional banks and credit unions. The company offers core bank and credit union data processing systems, complementary payment solutions, information security, digital banking, and risk management products. It serves over 950 banks and approximately 715 credit unions with core platforms, plus over 5,710 non-core clients.
